bundle.shortDescription: Local-first project catalog with optional connected-AI tools.
bundle.longDescription: Code Hangar inventories local AI coding projects and sessions, encrypts its catalog at rest, and adds explicitly enabled AI-app integration. MCP control remains local over stdio or named pipes. The optional Explain Code feature sends only the selected, safety-checked file excerpt to the provider you configure — a local model server on your machine or your own API endpoint — using your own key; it is never enabled in the Local edition.
